resume_struct.raw_text:
Alex Johnson
Software Engineer
alex.johnson@email.com | +1-555-0100 | github.com/alexj

SUMMARY
Final-year CS student with hands-on Python development, TCP/IP networking, and unit testing experience.

EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer Intern | Cisco | Jun 2024 - Present
- Built Python tools for network debugging and TCP/IP analysis
- Wrote unit tests and participated in agile code reviews
- Improved REST API latency by 20% through query optimization

EDUCATION
B.Tech Computer Science | IIT Delhi | 2023 - 2027

SKILLS
Python, TCP/IP, Linux, Git, unit testing, debugging, networking, REST APIs, Docker, SQL

jd_struct.raw_text: Software Engineer - Networking. Strong knowledge of Python, TCP/IP networking, routing, switching. Unit testing required. 2027 graduate.
